Opcode.name: PCM_OP_BAL_GET_ECE_BALANCES
Opcode.Doc: This opcode returns the balances from ECE.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Service poid - needed for identifying the product type in ECE.

String.name: PIN_FLD_LOGIN
String.Doc: The login or alias to use as the public user identity in ECE.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time to use to fetch balances.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TIME_ZONE_ID
String.Doc: Time zone in String format e.g "UTC","America/Los_Angeles". Default is "UTC".

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_MODE
Enum.Doc: Indicates if summary balances (0- default) or detailed balances (1) should be returned

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Service poid - needed for identifying the product type in ECE

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_MODE
Enum.Doc: indicates if summary balances (0- default) or detailed balances (1) should be returned

Array.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_IMPACTS
Array.Doc: Array id represents the resource id.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CURRENT_BAL
Decimal.Doc: This field represents the total of the current sub balance

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_FLOOR
Decimal.Doc: This field represents the credit floor

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_LIMIT
Decimal.Doc: This field represents the credit limit

Array.name: PIN_FLD_SUB_BAL_IMPACTS
Array.Doc: Array to hold sub balance validity information.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_TO
Timestamp.Doc: End time for validity of sub-balance item

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM
Timestamp.Doc: Start time for validity of sub-balance item

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
